title: Adrenaline Effect
description: A minecraft mod that adds an adrenaline effect which is triggered when the player reaches low hp.
body:
Adds a new **Adrenaline** status effect that automatically triggers when your health drops to low HP, giving you a brief burst of power with a built-in cooldown.

![A screenshot showing the adrenaline effect.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5345ecc838a8d497d88e075734eff6dae0ca9407.png)

## Features

When Adrenaline activates, the player temporarily:

* Moves faster
* Jumps slightly higher
* Attacks and mines more quickly

After Adrenaline wears off, a **cooldown** prevents it from triggering again immediately, so it cannot be abused in continuous combat.

## Why use this mod?

* Adds a simple, intuitive “last chance” mechanic for combat and exploration
* Makes low-health situations more dynamic and skill-based
* Fits naturally into vanilla gameplay without adding new items or complicated systems
* I recommend using this mod in an ultra hardcore world!

## Important details

* Adrenaline only activates at low health
* The effect is temporary and controlled by a cooldown
* Designed as a lightweight gameplay tweak that can be dropped into most modpacks without major changes to progression
